meaning: adj.使用荧光计的 使用荧光测定法的
examples: An improved fluorometric method for determining total estriol (E3) in pregnancy urine was introduced.
A fluorometric spectrophotometry was used to determine the content of anionic surfactant in crude oil.
Methods Phenylalanine(phe) concentration in dried-blood spot specimens on filter paper was detected by fluorometric method.
